description: Run by the hosted Mend Renovate App (github.com/apps/renovate). No self-hosted workflow — see issue #877 for the migration rationale.

packageRules.description: pnpm overrides are security pins, not feature upgrades. They force a transitive dep to the latest fix *within the major its consumers are written against*. A major bump jumps the override target past that major, leaving peers unsatisfied and breaking builds. Closed #1102/#1103/#1104 (and #1162/#1163/#1164 after the pins moved to pnpm-workspace.yaml) for exactly this. Patch/minor on overrides is still fine. Matched by file because the pins live in pnpm-workspace.yaml since the pnpm settings migration; the depType rule alone stopped matching there.
